name: Fan Neng
page_title: Fan Neng 樊能 [Liu Yao] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Sent by Liu Yao to guard the eastern bank of the Yagzi at Hengjiang, he and Yu Mi held off Yuan Shu’s officers Sun Ben and Wu Jing for more then a year. Yuan Shu then sent Sun Ce who took Niuzhu then started defeating Zhai Rong and Xie Li. Fan Neng countered by attacking Niuzhu but Sun Ce came back to drive him off, capturing “more than ten thousand” men and woman in the process.

sections.short-biography: Served Liu Yao. Died after Sun Ce shouted at him in battle.

full_text:
Fan Neng 樊能
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fan Neng (樊能). Served Liu Yao. Died after Sun Ce shouted at him in battle. Fan Neng was affiliated with Liu Yao.

Romance of the Three Kingdoms:15
BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Sent by Liu Yao to guard the eastern bank of the Yagzi at Hengjiang, he and Yu Mi held off Yuan Shu’s officers Sun Ben and Wu Jing for more then a year. Yuan Shu then sent Sun Ce who took Niuzhu then started defeating Zhai Rong and Xie Li. Fan Neng countered by attacking Niuzhu but Sun Ce came back to drive him off, capturing “more than ten thousand” men and woman in the process.
